issue_summary: added javadoc & cleaned up some API
javadoc_before:
/** * Provides concrete Writer/Reader impls for byte[] value per document. There * are 6 package-private impls of this, for all combinations of * STRAIGHT/DEREF/SORTED X fixed/not fixed. * *

* NOTE: The total amount of byte[] data stored (across a single segment) cannot * exceed 2GB. *

*

* NOTE: Each byte[] must be <= 32768 bytes in length *

* @lucene.experimental */
javadoc_after:
/** * Provides concrete Writer/Reader implementations for byte[] value per * document. There are 6 package-private default implementations of this, for * all combinations of {@link Mode#DEREF}/{@link Mode#STRAIGHT}/ * {@link Mode#SORTED} x fixed-length/variable-length. * *

* NOTE: Currently the total amount of byte[] data stored (across a single * segment) cannot exceed 2GB. *

*

* NOTE: Each byte[] must be <= 32768 bytes in length *

* * @lucene.experimental */
